findings.message: AutofixDeps interface is a placeholder comment (`/* Runtime + streams */`) rather than an explicit field list; consider making the shape explicit for consistency with the other Deps interfaces.

Rationale for excluding 'key' from DISALLOWED_LEAF_KEYS while including it in REDACTED_KEYS is subtle; a one-line note distinguishing config-time value-leaf detection from audit-time field-name redaction would prevent executor confusion.
